    @allure.title("测试登录场景：{username} / {password}")  # 动态标题
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("username,password,expected_status",
        [
            ("",  "secret_sauce", False),   # 空用户名应失败
            # ("standard_user", "", False),   # 空密码应失败
            # ("standard_user", "secret_sauce", True),  # 正确登录
            ("standard_user", "secret_sauce", "success"),
            ("performance_glitch_user", "secret_sauce", "success"),
            ("problem_user", "secret_sauce", "success"),
            ("locked_out_user", "secret_sauce", "locked"),
            ("fake_user", "wrong_pwd", "invalid"),  # 任意错误凭证
        ]
    )
    def test_login_scenarios(self, driver, username, password, expected_status):
        with allure.step("打开登录页面"):
            login_page = LoginPage(driver)
            login_page.open()
        with allure.step(f"输入用户名：{username}，密码：{password}"):
            login_page.login(username, password)
        with allure.step("验证登录结果"):
            if expected_status == "success":
                assert login_page.is_login_success() is True
            elif expected_status == "locked":
                assert login_page.is_login_success() is False
                error = login_page.get_error_message()
                assert "locked out" in error.lower()
            else:  # invalid
                assert login_page.is_login_success() is False
                error = login_page.get_error_message()
